# Searcher API

Scholarly paper search and retrieval service. Searches across OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, IEEE Xplore, Scopus, ScienceDirect, Google Scholar, Web of Science, and EBSCO. Also fetches web pages and downloads PDFs.

Base URL (production): https://searcher.xds-lab.com/aev/search
Interactive docs: <base>/docs
Full HTML reference: <base>/api-reference

## Result Record Shape

Every search endpoint returns results in this common envelope:

```json
{
  "provider": "openalex",
  "query": "UAV trajectory optimization",
  "search_date": "2026-05-27",
  "total_records_available": 69114,
  "total_records_downloaded": 200,
  "results": [
    {
      "title": "Energy-Efficient UAV Communication With Trajectory Optimization",
      "url": "https://doi.org/10.1109/twc.2017.2688328",
      "publication_year": 2017,
      "authors": ["Yong Zeng", "Rui Zhang"],
      "doi": "10.1109/twc.2017.2688328",
      "source": "IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications",
      "snippet": "Wireless communication with unmanned aerial vehicles...",
      "is_abstract": true,
      "pdf_link": "https://arxiv.org/pdf/1608.04792"
    }
  ]
}
```

`is_abstract: true` means `snippet` contains a full abstract. `is_abstract: false` means only a short excerpt or nothing. Empty string when a field is unavailable. `authors` is always an array. `total_records_available` is null for browser-scraped sources.

## Abstract Coverage

| Endpoint | Abstract? | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| /search_openalex | Always | Reconstructed from OpenAlex inverted index |
| /search_semantic_scholar | Always | From Semantic Scholar API |
| /search_ieeexplore | Always | From IEEE Xplore API |
| /search_web_of_science | Usually | From BibTeX export |
| /search_scopus | Default (true) | Via Abstract Retrieval API; set include_abstract=false to skip |
| /search_sciencedirect | Partial | Short dc:description only |
| /search_ebsco | Partial | Scraped excerpt when visible |
| /search_google_scholar_browser | Excerpt | 2–3 sentence snippet only |

## Utility Endpoints

### GET /health
Returns service status and version. No parameters.
Response: `{"status": "ok", "version_name": "searcher-stack-v1.1.168"}`

### GET /fetch_page
Fetch a URL and extract readable text, title, meta description, and up to 25 links.
- `url`* (string) — page URL
- `include_html` (bool, default: false) — include raw HTML
- `max_chars` (int ≥ 500, default: 12000) — max body text characters

### GET /review_page
Like /fetch_page but adds word count, estimated read time, and heading list. Suited for AI review tasks. Same parameters as /fetch_page.

### GET /download_pdf
Stream a PDF from a direct URL and save it server-side. Does not use the browser.
- `url`* (string) — direct URL to a PDF file
- Max size: 50 MB (configurable via PDF_MAX_MB)
- Response: `{"path": "...", "filename": "...", "size_bytes": 843210}`
- For subscription PDFs use the browser_worker /download_paper endpoint instead.

## Search Endpoints

All search endpoints default to `limit=200`. `year_low` and `year_high` are inclusive year filters available on all endpoints that support them.

### GET /search_openalex
Search OpenAlex — free, open index of 250M+ scholarly works. Full abstracts always included. Cursor-based pagination (automatic).
- `query`* (string) — full-text search, supports Boolean operators
- `limit` (int ≥ 1, default: 200) — max results, fetched in pages of 100, max 10,000
- `year_low` (int) — earliest publication year
- `year_high` (int) — latest publication year
- `is_oa` (bool) — true restricts to open access works only; OA results include pdf_link
- `work_type` (string) — filter by type: article, book, dataset, preprint, review, etc.

No API key required. Set OPENALEX_API_KEY to raise rate limits. Pagination is automatic — just increase limit.

### GET /search_semantic_scholar
Search Semantic Scholar via their public API. Good CS/STEM coverage with citation data. Full abstracts always included.
- `query`* (string) — free-text search
- `limit` (int ≥ 1, default: 200)

Does not support Boolean operators or year filtering. Set SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY for higher rate limits.

### GET /search_ieeexplore
Search IEEE Xplore via the Metadata API. Supports Boolean operators and rich filtering. Full abstracts always included. Auto-paginates in batches of 200.
- `query`* (string) — supports AND, OR, NOT
- `limit` (int ≥ 1, default: 200)
- `start_record` (int ≥ 1, default: 1) — **1-based** offset for manual pagination
- `year_low` / `year_high` (int)
- `content_type` (string) — Books, Conferences, Courses, Early Access, Journals, Magazines, Standards
- `open_access` (bool) — true restricts to open-access articles only
- `sort_field` (string) — article_number, article_title, or publication_title
- `sort_order` (string) — asc or desc
- `author` (string, min 3 chars) — filter by author first or last name

Requires IEEE_XPLORE_API_KEY.

### GET /search_scopus
Search Scopus (Elsevier). Supports full Scopus field-code Boolean syntax. Abstracts fetched by default via a separate API call per result.
- `query`* (string) — field codes: TITLE(), ABS(), AUTH(), TITLE-ABS-KEY(), etc.
- `limit` (int ≥ 1, default: 200) — fetched in pages of 25
- `start` (int ≥ 0, default: 0) — **0-based** offset
- `year_low` / `year_high` (int)
- `subj` (string, default: ENGI) — subject area: ENGI, COMP, MATE, PHYS, MATH, etc.
- `include_abstract` (bool, default: true) — fetch full abstract via Abstract Retrieval API (1 extra API call per result); set false for faster bulk retrieval

Requires ELSEVIER_API_KEY. include_abstract=true consumes Abstract Retrieval quota (~20,000 requests/week per key).

### GET /search_sciencedirect
Search ScienceDirect (Elsevier) full-text journals. Partial abstracts only (short dc:description).
- `query`* (string)
- `limit` (int ≥ 1, default: 200)
- `start` (int ≥ 0, default: 0) — **0-based** offset
- `year_low` / `year_high` (int)

Requires ELSEVIER_API_KEY.

### GET /search_google_scholar_browser
Search Google Scholar by driving the persistent Chromium browser. Broad coverage including preprints and grey literature. Excerpt only (no full abstract).
- `query`* (string)
- `limit` (int ≥ 1, default: 200)
- `start_index` (int ≥ 0, default: 0) — **0-based** offset
- `year_low` / `year_high` (int)
- `exclude_domains` (list[string]) — domains to exclude; defaults to researchgate.net, books.google.com, search.proquest.com; pass empty list to disable

total_records_available is always null. If a CAPTCHA appears, solve it once via noVNC — the session persists.

### GET /search_web_of_science
Search Web of Science via the persistent Chromium browser. Exports BibTeX. Abstracts usually included.
- `query`* (string)
- `limit` (int ≥ 1, default: 200)
- `year_low` / `year_high` (int)

Requires active WoS browser session. Log in via noVNC if session has expired.

### GET /search_ebsco
Search EBSCO Research via the persistent Chromium browser. Requires an active institutional EBSCO session.
- `query`* (string)
- `limit` (int ≥ 1, default: 200)
- `year_low` / `year_high` (int)

If blocked by a login wall, open noVNC, log in through the institution portal, then retry.

## ATRD Endpoints

### GET /search_atrd_papers
Return metadata for all papers from the ATRD 1st Symposium page. No file downloads. Fetches and parses HTML directly — no browser required.

No parameters.

Response:
```json
{
  "source": "https://www.atrdsymposium.org/...",
  "count": 53,
  "papers": [
    {
      "title": "Vertiport Placement for Urban Air Mobility to Reduce Time for Multimodal Travel",
      "authors": ["Yashovardhan S. Chati", "Yamini Sharma", "Kirti Nikam", "Prasad Devkar", "Arunchandar Vasan"],
      "section": "Autonomous, unmanned and remotely piloted aircraft systems and emerging operations",
      "is_best_paper": true,
      "full_paper_url": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/FILE_ID/view?usp=sharing",
      "presentation_url": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/FILE_ID/view?usp=sharing"
    }
  ]
}
```

`section` — symposium topic category. `is_best_paper` — true when awarded Best Paper. `presentation_url` — empty string for doctoral papers (slides not posted).

### GET /download_atrd_papers
Scrape the ATRD 1st Symposium papers page, download all full-paper PDFs from Google Drive, and return structured metadata. Source URL is fixed. Uses headless Playwright — no auth required. PDFs saved under `<DOWNLOAD_DIR>/atrd/`; re-running skips files already on disk.

No parameters.

Response:
```json
{
  "papers": [
    {
      "title": "Vertiport Placement for Urban Air Mobility",
      "authors": ["Jane Doe", "John Smith"],
      "url": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/FILE_ID/view?usp=sharing",
      "local_path": "/opt/searcher/downloads/atrd/vertiport_placement_for_urban_air_mobility.pdf",
      "size_bytes": 843210
    }
  ],
  "count": 42,
  "errors": []
}
```

`errors` lists any per-paper failures (bad link, parse error) without stopping the batch.

## EBSCO Download Endpoints

### GET /download_ebsco_paper
Download a single paper from an EBSCO detail page URL using the browser.
- `url`* (string) — EBSCO paper detail page URL (research.ebsco.com/c/.../search/details/...)

Response: `{"path": "...", "filename": "...", "size_bytes": 843210}`

### POST /download_ebsco_papers
Download multiple EBSCO papers sequentially. Request body: JSON array of EBSCO detail page URL strings. Failures on individual URLs do not stop the batch.

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|
| IEEE_XPLORE_API_KEY | Yes (for /search_ieeexplore) | IEEE Xplore Metadata API key |
| ELSEVIER_API_KEY | Yes (for Scopus/ScienceDirect) | Elsevier API key |
| OPENALEX_API_KEY | Optional | Raises OpenAlex rate limits |
| SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY | Optional | Raises Semantic Scholar rate limits |
| BROWSER_WORKER_URL | Yes (browser endpoints) | Internal URL of browser_worker (default: http://127.0.0.1:8010) |
| REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS | Optional | Per-request timeout in seconds (default: 20) |
| PDF_MAX_MB | Optional | Max PDF size in MB (default: 50) |
| DOWNLOAD_DIR | Optional | Server-side PDF save directory |
| USER_AGENT | Optional | HTTP User-Agent header |

## Pagination Reference

| Endpoint | Parameter | Style |
|---|---|---|
| /search_ieeexplore | start_record | 1-based integer |
| /search_scopus | start | 0-based integer |
| /search_sciencedirect | start | 0-based integer |
| /search_google_scholar_browser | start_index | 0-based integer |
| /search_openalex | — | Automatic cursor-based (pass limit only) |

## Common Agent Patterns

Check whether a result has a full abstract:
```python
if result["is_abstract"]:
    abstract = result["snippet"]
```

Fetch full page content from a result:
```
GET /fetch_page?url={result.url}
GET /review_page?url={result.url}   # adds word count, headings, read time
```

Download a paper:
```
# Open-access direct PDF:
GET /download_pdf?url={result.pdf_link}

# Subscription paper — use browser_worker:
POST https://searcher.xds-lab.com/aev/browser/download_paper
{"url": "{result.url}"}
```

Which endpoint to use:
- Full abstracts, free, broadest coverage → /search_openalex
- Peer-reviewed engineering/CS with abstracts → /search_ieeexplore, /search_semantic_scholar
- Broad Scopus coverage with abstracts → /search_scopus (include_abstract=true by default)
- Elsevier full-text articles → /search_sciencedirect
- Preprints and grey literature → /search_google_scholar_browser
- WoS citation tracking → /search_web_of_science
- EBSCO databases → /search_ebsco
